{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{\"session_id\":\"\",\"offset\":10}","has_more":true,"total":4728},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6822989317599133704","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容刺激好看，典型的爽文。美中不足的就是后面去什么仙云大陆就不怎么看了，推荐看到1400章就是在神仙岛住下就不用往后面看了。强推强推❗️❗️❗️"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1588600995,"group_id":"6488633879065267214","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"从未失手","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N63q+4ahhSITWObhXUIAupR9GvwjpG3KZNpHGQ1qnh4W","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/e7a32aa4497d4f79b69a124f6e380a60~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776357527\u0026x-signature=274ziD4HVO%2BHxjswee77RuUYkdY%3D","user_id":"2330568728254414","user_name":"不点赞都抬走"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2330568728254414","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6488633879065267214","book_info":{"abstract":"从山上下来的少年，为何武功如此绝世，为何医术如此高超，他的神仙姐姐是谁？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/c8bc70cb8539acf3b39599157aeccd15","author":"心在流浪","author_id":"","book_id":"6488633879065267214","book_name":"护花高手在都市","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":27,\"name\":\"战神赘婿\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27\u0026name=战神赘婿\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026sou ragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850\u0026name=无脑爽\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6511610188087165453","read_count":"12676","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"8460347"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"2953","tags":"战神赘婿,神医,都市,无脑爽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/905200045bf16d118d06~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779007491\u0026x-signature=q3pnUGa6ByEaBGAtAf%2B%2BTZzHdKU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"59227641099","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":25,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4719,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4719,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":15716},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6810996307944407048","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我看过最多遍的一本都市修仙小说。同类型小说本书目前只有鱼人二代的校花的贴身高手可以与之媲美。俩本书全篇用大白话写成。通俗易懂。希望越来越多的作者能采用这种写作方式。虽然四大名著闻名历史。但是剧情再精彩写作再优秀给人一种文绉绉的感觉。没有给人一种想接着看下去的欲望。总之这本书还可以吧，算得上比较成功的一本都市修仙小说。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1585808655,"group_id":"6488633879065267214","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一生二死三肉白骨四洗髓五针丹成六针元婴七针分身八针可逆天","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2D9wFU0hKgL8E04T57iOExzLXwhtHUpfGctlStmjt6L","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2436121279070605","user_name":"吃瓜娱乐林仔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2436121279070605","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is duration":471590,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":31709},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6804703148826492941","common":{"comment_type":2,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"三观挺正的作品。说起男主夏天，那股流氓气我很不喜欢，就不看了，但是慢慢的我就发现，这个夏天挺善良的，救助他人，为了一个陌生人和别人发生争执，这也是没谁了，因为买药呀，美容品，路见不平，进警局，被训，如愿的见到乔小乔（自己的老婆），女美男痞，很搭的一对"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1583898979,"group_id":"6488633879065267214","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"commonman","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6gFyomNOFxJmKwHBtAppGY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/267ca368728b419ea304399e99c9f193~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776364392\u0026x-signature=cOb2Yr8%2Bh9CAVq5XY9M0pipn6QQ%3D","user_id":"483401234912301","user_name":"充满正义感的碱杰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"483401234912301","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6488633879065267214","book_info":{"abstract":"从山上下来的少年，为何武功如此绝世，为何医术如此高超，他的神仙姐姐是谁？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/c8bc70cb8539acf3b39599157aeccd15","author":"心在流浪","author_id":"","book_id":"6488633879065267214","book_name":"护花高手在都市","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":27,\"name\":\"战神赘婿\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27\u0026name=战神赘婿\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026gen
